posts.author: Viv-maas (Vivianne)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday,
So, I’ve been using the application on mobile and I’ve noticed that the widget ‘E-mail and activities’ does not allow me to add a note with one of these two functions: either @tag a person or delete a note after I added it by accident. Can this widget get a little bit of love specifically in the mobile app platform?
Thanks!
Have a nice day
